name: standards fetcher: standards/fetchers/markdown-headers.sh extracts content under a specific markdown heading
command:
printf "# Top

## Section A
A content

## Section B
B content
" > doc.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetchers/markdown-headers.sh" --in "$PWD/doc.md" --heading "Section A" 2>out.txt && grep "A content" out.txt 1>&2 && ! grep "B content" out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
